debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
i : ℕ
h : i < w
h' : ¬args[i] = 0
h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

failed_attempts:
by_cases h0 : i = 0
    · subst h0
      unfold assert_bits_e
      simp [Vector.foldl]
      unfold assert_bit_e
      have hx0 : args.head ≠ 0 := by simpa using hi0
      have hx1 : args.head ≠ 1 := by simpa using hi1
      have hx : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro hmul
        have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
          simpa [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] using hmul
        rcases this with h' | h'
        · exact hx0 h'
        · exact hx1 h'
      simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, hx]
    · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
        have : i ≥ 1 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h0
        simpa [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using
          (Nat.sub_lt_sub_right hi 1)
      have hbad : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
        intro hall
        have hall' :
            (args.extract 1)[i - 1] = 0 ∨ (args.extract 1)[i - 1] = 1 := by
          have : (assert_bits (args.extract 1)) = true := hall
          unfold assert_bits at this
          have := (Vector.all_eq_true).1 this (i - 1) hi'
          simpa [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] using this
        have hget : (args.extract 1)[i - 1] = args[i] := by
          have : i ≥ 1 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h0
          simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm,
            Nat.add_assoc, Nat.sub_add_cancel this] using (rfl : (args.extract 1)[i - 1] = (args.extract 1)[i - 1])
        rcases hall' with h' | h'
        · exact hi0 (by simpa [hget] using h')
        · exact hi1 (by simpa [hget] using h')
      unfold assert_bits_e
      simp [Vector.foldl]
      unfold assert_bit_e
      by_cases hx : args.head * (1 - args.head) = 0
      · simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, hx]
        exact ih (args := args.extract 1) (cs := cs) hbad
      · simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, hx]

  | zero =>
    intro cs
    exact (False.elim (Nat.not_lt_zero _ h))
  | succ w ih =>
    intro cs
    by_cases hi : i = 0
    · subst hi
      unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
      simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h', h'']
    · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
        have : i ≤ w := Nat.le_of_lt_succ h
        exact Nat.sub_lt_of_pos_le (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi) this
      have htail : ¬ assert_bits args.tail := by
        unfold assert_bits
        have : ¬ (args.tail[i-1] = (0 : ZMod p) ∨ args.tail[i-1] = (1 : ZMod p)) := by
          have h0 : ¬ args[i] = (0 : ZMod p) := h'
          have h1 : ¬ args[i] = (1 : ZMod p) := h''
          have : args.tail[i-1] = args[i] := by
            simp [Vector.get_tail, Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)]
          intro hor
          rcases hor with hor | hor
          · exact h0 (by simpa [this] using hor)
          · exact h1 (by simpa [this] using hor)
        intro hall
        have := hall (i-1) hi'
        exact this.elim this

        have : args.tail[i-1] = args[i] := by
          simp [Vector.get_tail, Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)]
        exact h' (by simpa [this] using h0))
        (h'' := by
          intro h1
          have : args.tail[i-1] = args[i] := by
            simp [Vector.get_tail, Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)]
          exact h'' (by simpa [this] using h1))
      specialize this (Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs) htail
      simpa using this

by_cases h0 : i = 0
    · subst h0
      have : ¬args.head = 0 ∧ ¬args.head = 1 := by
        simpa using And.intro hi0 hi1
      have hne : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by

        have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by

            simpa [mul_eq_zero] using hz
          cases this with
          | inl h =>
            exact Or.inl h
          | inr h =>
            right
            have : args.head = 1 := by
              simpa [sub_eq_zero] using h.symm

        | inl h =>
          exact this.1 h
        | inr h =>
          exact this.2 h

      simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, hne]

      have hn' : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by

s

have hne : args[i] * (1 - args[i]) ≠ 0 := by
    intro hz
    have hcases : args[i] = 0 ∨ args[i] = 1 := by
      have : args[i] = 0 ∨ 1 - args[i] = 0 := by
        simpa [mul_eq_zero] using hz
      cases this with
      | inl h0 => exact Or.inl h0
      | inr hsub =>
        right
        have : args[i] = 1 := by
          have : (1 : ZMod p) = args[i] := by simpa [sub_eq_zero] using hsub
          simpa using this.symm
        exact this
    cases hcases with
    | inl h0 => exact (h' h0).elim
    | inr h1 => exact (h'' h1).elim

  have hn_eval : (Exp.v (args[i]) * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v (args[i])) : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)).eval ≠ 0 := by
    simpa [Exp.eval] using hne

  have : (assert_bits_e args cs).eval = .n := by
    unfold assert_bits_e
    revert cs
    induction w with
    | zero =>
      intro cs
      have : args = #v[] := by simp
      simp [this] at h
    | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      have hs : i = 0 ∨ 0 < i := Nat.eq_zero_or_pos i
      cases hs with
      | inl hi0 =>
        subst hi0
        have ht : ¬ args.head = 0 := by simpa using h'
        have ht' : ¬ args.head = 1 := by simpa using h''
        have hne' : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
          intro hz
          have hcases : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
            have : args.head = 0 ∨ 1 - args.head = 0 := by
              simpa [mul_eq_zero] using hz
            cases this with
            | inl h0 => exact Or.inl h0
            | inr hsub =>
              right
              have : args.head = 1 := by
                have : (1 : ZMod p) = args.head := by simpa [sub_eq_zero] using hsub
                simpa using this.symm
              exact this
          cases hcases with
          | inl h0 => exact (ht h0).elim
          | inr h1 => exact (ht' h1).elim
        have hn_eval' :
            (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head) : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)).eval ≠ 0 := by
          simpa [Exp.eval] using hne'
        simp [Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, hn_eval']
      | inr hipos =>
        have hi_lt : i - 1 < w := by
          have : i ≤ w := Nat.le_of_lt_succ h
          exact Nat.sub_lt_left_of_lt_add (Nat.succ_pos _) (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using h)
        have hne_tail : ¬ (args.tail)[i-1] = 0 := by
          intro hz
          have : args[i] = 0 := by
            cases i with
            | zero => cases (Nat.lt_asymm hipos hipos)
            | succ i =>
              simpa [Vector.getElem_tail] using hz
          exact h' this
        have hne_tail' : ¬ (args.tail)[i-1] = 1 := by
          intro hz
          have : args[i] = 1 := by
            cases i with
            | zero => cases (Nat.lt_asymm hipos hipos)
            | succ i =>
              simpa [Vector.getElem_tail] using hz
          exact h'' this
        have hbad_tail : ¬ assert_bits args.tail := by
          intro hall
          unfold assert_bits at hall
          have : (args.tail)[i - 1] == 0 ∨ (args.tail)[i - 1] == 1 := by
            have := (Vector.all_eq_true.mp hall) (i - 1) hi_lt
            simpa using this
          have : (args.tail)[i - 1] = 0 ∨ (args.tail)[i - 1] = 1 := by
            simpa [beq_iff_eq] using this
          cases this with
          | inl h0 => exact (hne_tail h0).elim
          | inr h1 => exact (hne_tail' h1).elim
        have ih' := ih (args := args.tail) (cs := assert_bit_e cs args.head) hbad_tail
        simp [Vector.foldl, ih']
  simpa using this

induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs
      cases Nat.not_lt_zero i h
  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      by_cases hi : i = 0
      · subst hi
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h', h'']
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          have : i ≥ 1 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi
          exact Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add.mp (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using h)
        have hidx : ¬ args.tail[i - 1] = (0 : ZMod p) := by
          simpa [Vector.get_tail, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc, hi] using h'
        have hidx' : ¬ args.tail[i - 1] = (1 : ZMod p) := by
          simpa [Vector.get_tail, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc, hi] using h''
        have : ¬ assert_bits args.tail := by
          unfold assert_bits
          simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true,
            decide_eq_true_eq, not_forall, not_or]
          refine ⟨i - 1, ?_, hidx, hidx'⟩
          simpa using hi'
        have := ih (args := args.tail) (i := i - 1) (h := hi') (h' := hidx) (h'' := hidx') (cs := Cs.eq0 (.v args.head * (.c 1 - .v args.head)) cs) this
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simpa using this

induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs
      cases (Nat.not_lt_zero i h)
  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      by_cases hi : i = 0
      · subst hi
        unfold assert_bits_e
        simp [Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h', h'']
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          have : i ≤ w := Nat.le_of_lt_succ h
          exact Nat.pred_lt_pred (Nat.ne_zero_of_ne_eq_zero hi) this
        have htail' : ¬ (args.tail[i - 1] = (0 : ZMod p)) := by
          simpa [Vector.getElem_tail] using h'
        have htail'' : ¬ (args.tail[i - 1] = (1 : ZMod p)) := by
          simpa [Vector.getElem_tail] using h''
        have : ¬ assert_bits args.tail := by
          unfold assert_bits
          simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true,
            decide_eq_true_eq, not_forall, not_or]
          refine ⟨i - 1, hi', htail', htail''⟩
        unfold assert_bits_e
        simp [Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e, ih this]

induction w with
  | zero =>
      cases (Nat.not_lt_zero i h)
  | succ w ih =>
      have hi0 : i = 0 ∨ ∃ j, i = j + 1 := by
        cases i with
        | zero => exact Or.inl rfl
        | succ j => exact Or.inr ⟨j, rfl⟩
      cases hi0 with
      | inl hi =>
          subst hi
          unfold assert_bits_e
          simp [Vector.foldl]
          have hx : args[0] * (1 - args[0]) ≠ 0 := by
            intro hx0
            have hmul : args[0] = 0 ∨ (1 - args[0]) = 0 := by
              exact mul_eq_zero.mp hx0
            cases hmul with
            | inl h0 => exact h' h0
            | inr h1 =>
                have : args[0] = 1 := by
                  simpa [sub_eq_zero] using h1
                exact h'' this
          simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, hx]
      | inr hsucc =>
          rcases hsucc with ⟨j, rfl⟩
          unfold assert_bits_e
          simp [Vector.foldl]
          apply ih (args := args.extract 1) (cs := assert_bit_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) cs args.head)
          intro ht
          apply h
          intro k hk
          cases k with
          | zero =>
              have : (j + 1 : ℕ) = 0 := by simpa using hk
              cases Nat.succ_ne_zero j this
          | succ k =>
              have hk' : k < w := by
                simpa [Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff] using hk
              have hget :
                  (args.extract 1)[k] = args[k.succ] := by
                simpa using (Vector.getElem_extract args 1 (w + 1) k)
              simpa [hget] using ht k hk'

revert cs
  induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs
      cases Nat.not_lt_zero i h
  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      by_cases hi : i = 0
      · subst hi
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h', h'']
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          have : i > 0 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi
          exact Nat.sub_lt_right_of_lt_add (a := 1) (b := i) (c := w) (by simpa [Nat.succ_eq_add_one] using h)
        have h'1 : ¬ (args.tail)[i - 1] = 0 := by
          simpa [Vector.get_tail, hi] using h'
        have h''1 : ¬ (args.tail)[i - 1] = 1 := by
          simpa [Vector.get_tail, hi] using h''
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simpa using ih (args := args.tail) (i := i - 1) (h := hi') (h' := h'1) (h'' := h''1) (cs := assert_bit_e cs args.head)

by_cases hih : i = 0
    · subst hih
      have hb : ¬ args[0] = 0 ∧ ¬ args[0] = 1 := ⟨h0, h1⟩
      have : Exp.eval (Exp.v args[0] * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args[0])) ≠ 0 := by
        intro hz
        have hz' : args[0] * (1 - args[0]) = 0 := by
          simpa [Exp.eval] using hz
        have : args[0] = 0 ∨ args[0] = 1 := by
          have : args[0] = 0 ∨ 1 - args[0] = 0 := by
            simpa [mul_eq_zero] using hz'
          cases this with
          | inl h0' => exact Or.inl h0'
          | inr hsub =>
            right
            have : args[0] = 1 := by
              have : 1 - args[0] = 1 - 1 := by simpa using congrArg (fun t => 1 - t) rfl
              simpa [sub_eq_zero] using (sub_eq_zero.mp hsub).symm
            exact this
        cases this with
        | inl h0' => exact hb.1 h0'
        | inr h1' => exact hb.2 h1'
      unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
      simp [Cs.eval, this]
    · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
        have : 0 < i := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hih
        exact Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add'.2 (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hi)
      have : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
        intro ha
        unfold assert_bits at ha
        have ha' := (Vector.all_eq_true).1 ha
        have : (args.extract 1)[i - 1] = args[i] := by
          have : (i - 1) < w := hi'
          simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm,
            Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hih)] using rfl
        have hb := ha' (i - 1) hi'
        have hb' : args[i] = 0 ∨ args[i] = 1 := by
          simpa [this] using hb
        cases hb' with
        | inl h0' => exact h0 h0'
        | inr h1' => exact h1 h1'
      have htail : (assert_bits_e (args.extract 1)
          (Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs)).eval = denotation.n := by
        exact ih (args := args.extract 1)
          (cs := Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs) this
      unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
      simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
        add_tsub_cancel_right] at htail
      simpa using htail

| succ w =>
      cases i with
      | zero =>
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h0', h1']
      | succ i =>
        have hi' : i < w.succ := by
          have : i.succ < w.succ.succ := by simpa using hi
          exact Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ this
        have :
            ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
          unfold assert_bits
          simp only [Vector.all_eq_true, not_forall]
          refine ⟨i, ?_, ?_⟩
          · simpa [Vector.size_extract, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right] using hi'
          · have : (args.extract 1)[i] = args[i.succ] := by
              simp [Vector.getElem_extract]
            simpa [this] using (show ¬ (args[i.succ] = 0 ∨ args[i.succ] = 1) from ⟨h0, h1⟩)
        have := ih (args := args.extract 1)
          (cs := Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs) this
        simp [Vector.foldl, this]

by_cases h0 : i = 0
      · subst h0
        unfold assert_bits_e
        simp [Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
          intro hz
          have hb : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
            simpa [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] using hz
          cases hb with
          | inl h0 => exact hne0 (by simpa using h0)
          | inr h1 => exact hne1 (by simpa using h1)
        simp [Exp.eval, this]
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          have : i ≤ w := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp hi
          exact Nat.sub_lt_left_of_lt_add (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h0) (by simpa [Nat.add_comm] using hi)
        have hnbits' : ¬ assert_bits (args.tail) := by
          intro hbits
          have htail0 : ¬ args.tail[i - 1] = 0 := by
            intro hz; apply hne0
            have : args[i] = args.tail[i - 1] := by
              simpa [Vector.getElem_tail] using (rfl : args[i] = args[i])
            exact this.trans hz
          have htail1 : ¬ args.tail[i - 1] = 1 := by
            intro hz; apply hne1
            have : args[i] = args.tail[i - 1] := by
              simpa [Vector.getElem_tail] using (rfl : args[i] = args[i])
            exact this.trans hz
          have : ¬ (args.tail[i - 1] = 0 ∨ args.tail[i - 1] = 1) := by
            exact not_or.mpr ⟨htail0, htail1⟩
          have hall : ∀ j : ℕ, j < w → (args.tail[j] = 0 ∨ args.tail[j] = 1) := by
            intro j hj
            have := congrArg (fun b => b = true) (by rfl : assert_bits args.tail = assert_bits args.tail)
            unfold assert_bits at hbits
            have : (Vector.all args.tail (fun x : ZMod p => x == 0 ∨ x == 1)) = true := by
              simpa [assert_bits] using hbits
            have := (Vector.all_eq_true).1 this j hj
            simpa [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] using this
          exact this (hall (i - 1) hi')
        unfold assert_bits_e
        simp [Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e]
        exact ih (args := args.tail)
          (cs := Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs) hnbits'

revert cs
  induction w with
  | zero =>
    intro cs
    cases Nat.not_lt_zero i h
  | succ w ih =>
    intro cs
    by_cases hi : i = 0
    · subst hi
      unfold assert_bits_e
      simp [Vector.foldl]
      unfold assert_bit_e Cs.eval Exp.eval
      have : (args[0] * (1 - args[0]) : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
        intro hz
        have : args[0] = 0 ∨ args[0] = 1 := by
          simpa [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] using hz
        cases this with
        | inl h0 => exact (h' h0)
        | inr h1 => exact (h'' h1.symm)
      simp [this]
    · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
        have hi0 : 0 < i := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi
        exact Nat.pred_lt_pred hi0 h
      have hbad : ¬ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = 0 ∧ ¬ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = 1 := by
        have hget :
            (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = args[i] := by
          have hi1 : 1 ≤ i := Nat.succ_le_iff.2 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)
          simp [Vector.getElem_extract, hi1, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
        constructor
        · intro hz
          apply h'
          simpa [hget] using hz
        · intro hz
          apply h''
          simpa [hget] using hz
      have : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1 (w + 1)) := by
        unfold assert_bits
        simp only [not_forall]
        refine ⟨i - 1, hi', ?_⟩
        have hne0 : ¬ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = 0 := hbad.1
        have hne1 : ¬ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = 1 := hbad.2
        intro hb
        have : (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = 0 ∨ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = 1 := by
          simpa [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] using hb
        cases this with
        | inl hz => exact (hne0 hz)
        | inr hz => exact (hne1 hz)
      unfold assert_bits_e
      simp [Vector.foldl]
      have := ih (args := args.extract 1 (w + 1)) (i := i - 1) (h := hi') (h' := hbad.1) (h'' := hbad.2) (cs := Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs) this
      exact this

revert cs
  induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs
      cases Nat.not_lt_zero i h
  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      by_cases hi : i = 0
      · subst hi
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h', h'']
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          have : i ≤ w := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp h
          exact Nat.sub_lt_left_of_lt_add (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi) (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using h)
        have htail : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
          unfold assert_bits
          have hiw : i < w + 1 := h
          have hi0 : 1 ≤ i := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)
          have hsub : i - 1 < w := by
            have : i < w + 1 := h
            exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.pred_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)) (Nat.le_of_lt_succ this)
          refine (by
            simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true,
              decide_eq_true_eq, not_forall, not_or]
            refine ⟨i - 1, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
            · exact hsub
            · simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, hi0, Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)] using h'
            · simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, hi0, Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)] using h'')
        have := ih (args := args.extract 1) (cs := Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs) htail
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl at this ⊢
        simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
          add_tsub_cancel_right] at this
        simpa [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval] using this

revert cs
  induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs
      cases (Nat.not_lt_zero i h)
  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      have hi : i = 0 ∨ ∃ j, i = j.succ := Nat.eq_zero_or_exists_eq_succ i
      rcases hi with rfl | ⟨j, rfl⟩
      · simp [assert_bits_e, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      · have hj : j < w := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h
        simpa [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e] using (ih (args := args.tail) (i := j) hj cs (by
          simpa using h))

by_cases hhead : i = 0
    · subst hhead
      unfold assert_bits_e
      simp [Vector.foldl] at *
      unfold assert_bit_e
      simp [Cs.eval]
      have hne0 : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro hz
        have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
          simpa [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] using hz
        rcases this with h0' | h1'
        · exact h0 h0'
        · exact h1 h1'
      simp [hne0]
    · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
        have : i ≥ 1 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hhead
        exact Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add.mp (by simpa [Nat.one_add] using hi)
      have : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
        intro hb
        unfold assert_bits at hb
        have hb' := (Vector.all_eq_true).1 hb
        have := hb' (i - 1) hi'
        have hget :
            (args.extract 1)[i - 1] = args[i] := by
          have : i = (i - 1) + 1 := by
            exact (Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hhead)).symm
          simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, this, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
        have : args[i] = 0 ∨ args[i] = 1 := by
          simpa [hget, beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] using this
        rcases this with h0' | h1'
        · exact h0 h0'
        · exact h1 h1'
      unfold assert_bits_e
      simp [Vector.foldl] at *
      specialize ih (args := args.extract 1) (cs := assert_bit_e cs args.head) this
      simpa using ih

induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs
      cases (Nat.not_lt_zero _ h)
  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      classical
      by_cases hi0 : i = 0
      · subst hi0
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simp [Cs.eval]
        have : (args[0] : ZMod p) * (1 - args[0]) ≠ 0 := by
          intro hz
          have hmul : (args[0] : ZMod p) = 0 ∨ (1 - args[0]) = 0 := by
            exact mul_eq_zero.mp hz
          cases hmul with
          | inl ha =>
              exact h' ha
          | inr hb =>
              have : (args[0] : ZMod p) = 1 := by
                simpa [sub_eq_zero] using hb
              exact h'' this
        simp [this]
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          have hi_pos : 0 < i := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi0
          have hi_succ : i < w + 1 := h
          exact Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add.mpr (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hi_succ)
        have hbad_tail :
            ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1 (w + 1)) := by
          intro ht
          have : assert_bits args := by
            unfold assert_bits at ht ⊢
            have ht' : ∀ j : Fin w, ((args.extract 1 (w + 1))[j] = 0 ∨ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[j] = 1) := by
              simpa [Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] using ht
            have h0 : (args[0] = 0 ∨ args[0] = 1) := by
              by_cases h00 : args[0] = 0
              · exact Or.inl h00
              · exact Or.inr (by
                  by_contra h01
                  exact h00 (by
                    have : (args[0] : ZMod p) * (1 - args[0]) = 0 := by
                      have : (args[0] : ZMod p) = 0 ∨ (args[0] : ZMod p) = 1 := by
                        exact Or.elim (by classical exact (em (args[0] = 0))) Or.inl (fun hn => Or.inr (by classical exact (by
                          have := (em (args[0] = 1))
                          cases this with
                          | inl h1 => exact h1
                          | inr h1 => exfalso; exact h01 h1)))
                      cases this with
                      | inl ha => simp [ha]
                      | inr hb => simp [hb]
                    exact False.elim (by
                      have : args[0] = 0 ∨ args[0] = 1 := by
                        classical
                        exact Or.inr (by
                          have : args[0] = 1 := by
                            classical
                            exact by
                              have := (Classical.decEq (ZMod p) (args[0]) 1)
                              by_cases h1 : args[0] = 1
                              · exact h1
                              · exfalso; exact h01 h1
                          exact this)
                      cases this with
                      | inl ha => exact h00 ha
                      | inr hb => exact h01 hb)))
            have hall : ∀ j : Fin (w + 1), (args[j] = 0 ∨ args[j] = 1) := by
              intro j
              cases j using Fin.cases with
              | hz =>
                  simpa using h0
              | hs j =>
                  have := ht' j
                  simpa [Vector.getElem_extract] using this
            simpa [Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] using hall
          exact h this
        have : (assert_bits_e (args.extract 1 (w + 1)) cs).eval = .n := by
          apply ih
          · exact hbad_tail
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simp [Cs.eval, this]

| zero =>
    cases Nat.not_lt_zero i h
  | succ w ih =>
    have hdecomp : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
      ext j hj
      cases j using Fin.cases with
      | hz =>
        simp
      | hs j =>
        simp
    rw [hdecomp]
    unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      have hne : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ (0 : ZMod p) := by
        intro hz
        have h0or1 : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
          simpa [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] using hz
        cases h0or1 with
        | inl h0 => exact h' (by simpa using h0)
        | inr h1 => exact h'' (by simpa using h1)
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, hne]
    | succ i =>
      have hi' : i < w := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h
      have hnot : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
        intro hb
        have : assert_bits args := by
          unfold assert_bits at hb ⊢
          simp only [Vector.all_eq_true, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right, Vector.getElem_extract] at hb
          simp only [Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] at hb
          unfold assert_bits
          simp only [Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq]
          intro j hj
          cases j using Fin.cases with
          | hz =>
            have : (args[0] = 0 ∨ args[0] = 1) := by
              by_contra hn
              have hn' : ¬ args[0] = 0 ∧ ¬ args[0] = 1 := by
                simpa [not_or] using hn
              exact (hn'.1 h') 
            exact this
          | hs j =>
            have hj' : (j : ℕ) < w := by
              simpa using hj
            have := hb j hj'
            simpa using this
        exact h this
      specialize (ih (args := args.extract 1) (cs := assert_bit_e cs args.head) hnot)
      simpa [assert_bit_e] using ih

have hbad : args[i] * (1 - args[i]) ≠ 0 := by
    intro hz
    have : args[i] = 0 ∨ args[i] = 1 := by
      have := mul_eq_zero.mp hz
      cases this with
      | inl h0 => exact Or.inl h0
      | inr h1 =>
        right
        have : (1 - args[i] = 0) := h1
        have : args[i] = 1 := by
          have : args[i] = 1 - 0 := by simp
          simpa [sub_eq_zero] using (eq_of_sub_eq_zero this).symm
        exact this
    cases this with
    | inl h0 => exact h' h0
    | inr h1 => exact h'' h1

  revert cs

    · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
        have : i ≤ w := Nat.le_of_lt_succ h
        have : 0 < i := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi0
        exact Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add_of_pos this |>.2 (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using h)
      have hbad' : (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] * (1 - (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1]) ≠ 0 := by
        simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hbad
      have : (assert_bits_e args cs).eval = .n := by
        simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e]
        have : (assert_bits_e (args.extract 1 (w + 1)) (Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs)).eval = .n := by
          apply ih (args := args.extract 1 (w + 1)) (i := i - 1)
          · exact hi'
          · simpa [Vector.getElem_extract] using h'
          · simpa [Vector.getElem_extract] using h''
        simpa using this
      exact this

induction w with
  | zero =>
    cases Nat.not_lt_zero i h
  | succ w ih =>
    by_cases hi : i = 0
    · subst hi

    · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
        have : i ≤ w := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp h
        exact Nat.pred_lt_pred (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)) this
      have h'1 : ¬ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = (0 : ZMod p) := by
        simpa [Vector.getElem_extract] using h'
      have h''1 : ¬ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = (1 : ZMod p) := by
        simpa [Vector.getElem_extract] using h''
      have : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1 (w + 1)) := by

| zero =>

induction w with

        have h''1 : ¬ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = 1 := by

        have : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1 (w + 1)) := by

induction w with
  | zero =>

  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs

        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simp [Cs.eval]
        have hx : args.head ≠ 0 := by simpa using h'
        have hx1 : args.head ≠ 1 := by simpa using h''
        have hmul : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by

        have : Exp.eval (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) ≠ 0 := by

      · have hi1 : i - 1 < w := by
          have hi : i ≥ 1 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi0
          have hi_lt : i < w + 1 := h
          exact Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add_of_pos hi (by simpa [Nat.sub_add_cancel hi] using hi_lt)
        have hx0 : ¬(args.extract 1)[i - 1] = 0 := by
          simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.2 hi0] using h'
        have hx1 : ¬(args.extract 1)[i - 1] = 1 := by
          simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.2 hi0] using h''
        have hbad : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
          unfold assert_bits
          simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true,
            decide_eq_true_eq, not_forall, not_or]

        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e

| zero =>

induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs

  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      by_cases hi : i = 0
      · subst hi
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h', h'']
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          have : i ≤ w := Nat.le_of_lt_succ h
          have : 1 ≤ i := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi
          exact Nat.sub_lt_sub_right h 1
        have htail : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
          intro hb
          have : (args.extract 1)[i - 1] = args[i] := by
            have : (i - 1) < w := hi'
            simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm,
              Nat.add_assoc, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi)] using (rfl : _)
          have hb' := (by
            unfold assert_bits at hb
            simpa [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true,

          | inl hz => exact h' hz
          | inr ho => exact h'' ho
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
        have : Array.foldl assert_bit_e cs args.toArray =
            Array.foldl assert_bit_e (assert_bit_e cs args.head) (args.extract 1).toArray := by
          simp [Vector.toArray, Vector.extract, Array.foldl]
        simp [this, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval]
        apply ih (args := args.extract 1) (cs := assert_bit_e cs args.head) htail

by_cases hi0 : i = 0
    · subst hi0
      -- failure at head
      unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ (0 : ZMod p) := by
        intro hz
        have hb : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
          simpa [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] using hz
        cases hb with
        | inl h0' => exact h0 (by simpa using h0')
        | inr h1' => exact h1 (by simpa using h1'.symm)
      have : (Exp.eval (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
        simpa [Exp.eval] using this
      simp [this]
    · -- failure in tail
      have hi1 : i - 1 < w := by
        have : i ≤ w := Nat.le_of_lt_succ hi
        exact Nat.sub_lt_left_of_lt_add (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi0) (by simpa [Nat.add_comm] using hi)
      have h0' : ¬ (args.extract 1)[i-1] = (0 : ZMod p) := by
        intro hz
        apply h0
        have : args[i] = (args.extract 1)[i-1] := by
          simp [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi0)]
        simpa [this] using hz
      have h1' : ¬ (args.extract 1)[i-1] = (1 : ZMod p) := by
        intro hz
        apply h1
        have : args[i] = (args.extract 1)[i-1] := by
          simp [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi0)]
        simpa [this] using hz
      have hbad' : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
        intro hgood
        unfold assert_bits at hgood
        have : ((args.extract 1)[i-1] == (0 : ZMod p) ∨ (args.extract 1)[i-1] == (1 : ZMod p)) = true := by
          have := congrArg (fun b => b) (Vector.all_eq_true.mp hgood (i-1) hi1)
          simpa using this
        simp [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] at this
        rcases this with h | h
        · exact h0' h
        · exact h1' h
      unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
      -- peel one step and apply IH to the remainder
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      by_cases hhead : (Exp.eval (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) : ZMod p) = 0
      · simp [hhead]
        -- now reduce to tail
        have := ih (args := args.extract 1) (cs := cs) hbad'
        simpa [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl] using this
      · simp [hhead]

| zero =>
      cases (Nat.not_lt_zero _ h)
  | succ w ih =>
      by_cases hi : i = 0
      · subst hi
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, h', h'']
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          have : i > 0 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi
          exact Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add_of_pos this |>.2 (by simpa [Nat.succ_eq_add_one] using h)
        have h'1 : ¬ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = 0 := by
          simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, hi] using h'
        have h''1 : ¬ (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = 1 := by
          simpa [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, hi] using h''
        have hbad : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1 (w + 1)) := by
          unfold assert_bits
          simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true,
            decide_eq_true_eq, not_forall, not_or]
          refine ⟨i - 1, ?_, h'1, h''1⟩
          simpa using hi'
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        have : (assert_bits_e (args.extract 1 (w + 1)) cs).eval = denotation.n := by
          simpa using (ih (args := args.extract 1 (w + 1)) (cs := cs) hbad)
        simpa [Cs.eval] using this

revert cs
  induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs
      cases (Nat.not_lt_zero i h)
  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      have hdecomp : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext j hj
        cases j with
        | zero =>
            simp
        | succ j =>
            simp [add_comm]
      have ht : (Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head).tail = args.tail := by
        ext j hj
        simp [Vector.insertIdx, Vector.getElem_cons_succ]
      have hh : (Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head).head = args.head := by
        simp [Vector.insertIdx]
      rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos i with hi0 | hipos
      · subst hi0
        rw [hdecomp]
        simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h', h'']
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          exact Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ (Nat.sub_one_lt_of_lt (Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff.mp h))
        have h'ne0 : ¬ args.tail[i-1] = 0 := by
          have : args.tail[i - 1] = args[i] := by
            have hi1 : i = (i - 1) + 1 := by
              exact (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos hipos).symm
            simpa [Vector.getElem_tail, hi1, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
          simpa [this] using h'
        have h'ne1 : ¬ args.tail[i-1] = 1 := by
          have : args.tail[i - 1] = args[i] := by
            have hi1 : i = (i - 1) + 1 := by
              exact (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos hipos).symm
            simpa [Vector.getElem_tail, hi1, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
          simpa [this] using h''
        rw [hdecomp]
        unfold assert_bits_e
        simp only [Vector.foldl, List.foldl_toArray']
        have : (assert_bits_e (w:=w) args.tail (assert_bit_e cs args.head)).eval = denotation.n := by
          have hnb : ¬ assert_bits args.tail := by
            intro hb
            unfold assert_bits at hb
            have hb' : (args.tail.toArray.all fun x : ZMod p => x == 0 ∨ x == 1) = true := by
              simpa [assert_bits] using hb
            have : args.tail[i - 1] == 0 ∨ args.tail[i - 1] == 1 := by
              have := congrArg (fun b => b) hb'
              have hmem := (Array.all_eq_true).1 hb' (i-1) (by
                simpa [Vector.size_toArray] using hi')
              simpa using hmem
            simp only [Bool.or_eq_true, beq_iff_eq, decide_eq_true_eq] at this
            rcases this with h0 | h1
            · exact h'ne0 h0
            · exact h'ne1 h1
          have := ih (args:=args.tail) (i:=i-1) (h:=hi') (h':=h'ne0) (h'':=h'ne1) cs hnb
          simpa [assert_bits_e] using this
        simpa [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval] using this

| zero =>
      cases Nat.not_lt_zero i h
  | succ w ih =>
      by_cases hi : i = 0
      · subst hi
        unfold assert_bits_e
        simp [Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
          intro hz
          have hb : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
            have : args.head * (1 - args.head) = 0 := hz
            simpa [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] using this
          rcases hb with hb | hb
          · exact h' (by simpa using hb)
          · exact h'' (by simpa using hb)
        simp [this]
      · have hi' : i - 1 < w := by
          have : i ≥ 1 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi
          exact Nat.sub_lt_of_pos_le (Nat.succ_pos _) (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp this) (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le h (Nat.le_succ _))
        have htail : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1 (w + 1)) := by
          intro ht
          have : (args.extract 1 (w + 1))[i - 1] = args[i] := by
            simp [Vector.getElem_extract, Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi), Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi))]
          unfold assert_bits at ht
          have ht' := (Vector.all_eq_true).1 ht (i - 1) hi'
          simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] at ht'
          rcases ht' with ht' | ht'
          · exact h' (by simpa [this] using ht')
          · exact h'' (by simpa [this] using ht')
        unfold assert_bits_e
        simp [Vector.foldl, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        have := ih (args := args.extract 1 (w + 1)) (cs := cs) htail
        simpa using this
